en: Oh, sorry. I've got to take this. Hello?
ko: 아, 미안해. 이 전화 받아야 해. 여보세요?

en: You still don't know what the title is? No, no one does.
It's gone on way too long to ask her about it.
ko: 아니, 아무도 몰라. 그녀에게 물어보기에 너무 오래 걸렸어.

en: This title isn't hard to understand, right? No. It's awesome.
I love that we can work while we're on cocaine. Could it be Roar Her, Gem Her?
ko: 우리가 코카인을 하면서 일할 수 있다는 게 좋아.

en: No, that doesn't make any sense. It's got to be Oral Germ Whore. Okay, bye.
ko: 아니, 그건 말이 안 돼. 'Oral Germ Whore'여야 해. 그럼, 안녕.

en: Sorry, that was my publicist. You know, I have to admit, I kind of like that Tracy's a bit of a whore.
Tracy Jordan is no longer the only movie star on TGS.
ko: 사실, 트레이시 조던이 TGS의 유일한 영화 스타가 아니라는 게 마음에 들어.

en: Maybe I'll finally start getting some respect around here. What's up, flabby butt?
You look weird today. Hey, Pete, you want to see a comic book with pregnant zombie nuns?
ko: 이봐, 피트, 임신한 좀비 수녀가 나오는 만화책 보고 싶어?

en: Yes, I do. Cool. And I have a screener of the movie for you.
I want you to watch it. Ah, The Rural Juror.
That is something. I can't wait to watch it.
Oh, you won't be disappointed. The source material was amazing.
ko: 실망하지 않을 거야. 원작이 정말 훌륭했어.

en: It's hard to go wrong with a Kevin Grisham novel.
ko: 케빈 그리샴 소설은 잘못될 일이 없어.
